parameters-en.Speed: Controls how long it takes to "speak" from one vowel to the other.
parameters-en.Start: Selects the sound of the starting vowel.
parameters-en.End: Selects the sound of the ending vowel.
parameters-en.Auto: Selects one of four sequences that automatically shift between the Start and End vowels in different ways, at the speed set by the Speed knob.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
